content: Phase 1: POC - Test Groq, Kimi, Resend, Vapi, Retell integrations in isolation
Phase 1: Fix integration issues - Retell primary (Vapi needs private key from user, Kimi backup-only)
Phase 2: Get design guidelines from design_agent
Phase 2: Build backend - FastAPI with audit/chat/booking/auth/email/call routes + services
Phase 2: Build frontend - All 9 public pages (Home, Services, Audit, Report, Results, About, Team, Blog, Contact)
Phase 2: Build admin dashboard with login + 9 sections
Phase 2: AI Chatbot floating widget with Groq
Phase 2: AI Audit form + auto-generated report with ROI calculator
Phase 2: Email automation sequences via Resend
Phase 2: AI Calling integration (Retell primary, Vapi fallback)
Phase 2: SEO meta tags, sitemap, structured data
Phase 2: All user stories covered end-to-end
Phase 2: End-to-End Testing using testing_agent_v3 - 100% pass rate
